name: Boiler Room No. 4
description: Five decks below the Boat Deck, the aft boiler room is still operational — six double-ended boilers roar with coal fire, but the floor plates are slick with a thin film of seawater that has begun seeping under the forward bulkhead, and the temperature differential between the furnace heat and the incoming Atlantic water creates a rolling fog at ankle height.
atmosphericDetails: The noise is total — the roar of furnaces, the hiss of escaping steam from a relief valve, and beneath it all the deep metallic groan of the hull plates under pressure
Coal-black water swirls around the floor grating in thin ribbons, growing thicker every ten minutes — the men working here have stopped pretending it is condensation

The emergency lighting casts everything in amber, making the stokers' faces look like figures in a painting of hell, their shovels moving in mechanical rhythm despite the water rising around their boots
